description: Agent mode definitions controlling scope (what to do) and output style (how results are shown).

current_mode.description: Defines WHAT the agent does in current moment.

execution_mode.description: Defines HOW the agent shows result to user.

rules.verbose_trigger: When user explicitly requests 'verbose', 'debug mode', or 'show steps' → agent sets 'verbose' in WM and works one turn.
rules.auto_reset: After verbose answer, agent resets to 'silent'.
rules.explicit_reset: When user says 'quiet', 'silent', or 'less' → instant reset.
